title: MetaVoice · The duplex speech model for revenue calls
excerpt: MetaVoice listens while it speaks, so calls stay natural through interruptions, overlap and background voices. Fewer people hang up. More convert. Run a paid 30-day pilot.
content_html:
MetaVoice listens while it speaks, so calls stay natural through interruptions, overlap and background voices. Available on-prem.

Fewer people hang up. More convert.

MetaVoice in action

Listen to a real call, unedited.

Hear MetaVoice naturally handle moments that break other voice agents.

you metavoice

00:00 / 01:45

problem

Over 40% of people hang up on voice agents within 30 seconds.

Every hang-up is a lost customer who calls a competitor. Some become one-star reviews.

Voice agents today

Walkie-talkie turn-taking

AI and human cut each other off.

Fails on interruptions, overlap and background speech

Awkward pauses. AI and human ping pong for their turn.

Doesn't listen, just transcribes

Fails to understand the person. Gets details wrong. Never asks to clarify.

why this happens

Voice agents are built on a fragmented stack.

It forces walkie-talkie turn-taking and loses information at every step.

This forces people to speak like AI, creating friction that causes them to disengage.

metavoice

One model that listens, thinks and speaks in 350 ms.

It's learned the mechanics of conversation directly from human data.

Full duplex

Listens while it speaks, so interruptions, overlap and background voices don't break the call.

Reasons over speech, not text

Understands the words, how you said them and what's happening around you. Asks when it isn't sure.

Nothing to assemble

No ASR, TTS, turn detector or dialogue harness to build. You define the workflow, tools and personality.

you metavoice

Both channels stay open.
You barge in mid-sentence. It yields, keeps listening, and picks right back up.

production

One model. Same control.

Control

Guardrails

Filter or block a response before the caller hears it.

Debuggable

Inspect every layer of a turn: reasoning, tool calls and speech, in text and audio.

Observable

Streams into the evaluation and monitoring tools you already run.

Yours, not a shared api

Build your agent

Set the workflow in a prompt, give it tools to call, choose its personality.

Your VPC

Deploy in your cloud. Data never leaves your network.

Improves over time

Coach it with feedback like a new rep. Or fine-tune it on your own calls.

Costs the same

At parity with your cascaded stack.

pilot

Run a pilot on one use case
for 30 days.

Let's start

© 2026 MetaVoice

content_html_zh:
MetaVoice 边听边说，因此通话不会受到干扰、重叠和背景声音的影响，保持自然。 可在本地使用。

挂断电话的人越来越少。 更多转化。

元语音的实际应用

聆听未经编辑的真实通话。

Hear MetaVoice 能够自然地处理令其他语音代理崩溃的时刻。

你元声音

00:00 / 01:45

问题

超过 40% 的人在 30 秒内挂断语音代理。

每次挂断都意味着失去一位致电竞争对手的客户。 有些成为一星评论。

今天的语音代理

对讲机轮流

人工智能和人类彼此割裂。

无法应对干扰、重叠和背景语音

尴尬的停顿。 轮到人工智能和人类乒乓球了。

不听，只抄

无法理解这个人。 细节错误。 从不要求澄清。

为什么会发生这种情况

语音代理构建在分散的堆栈上。

它迫使对讲机轮流进行，并且每一步都会丢失信息。

这迫使人们像人工智能一样说话，产生摩擦，导致他们脱离。

元语音

一种在 350 毫秒内完成聆听、思考和说话的模型。

它直接从人类数据中学习对话机制。

全双工

边听边说，因此中断、重叠和背景声音不会中断通话。

理由多于言语，而非文字

理解这些词、你怎么说的以及你周围发生的事情。 不确定时询问。

没有什么可以组装的

无需构建 ASR、TTS、转弯检测器或对话工具。 您可以定义工作流程、工具和个性。

你元声音

两个通道都保持开放。 你在句子中间插话。 它屈服，继续聆听，并立即恢复。

生产

一种型号。 一样的控制。

控制

护栏

在呼叫者听到响应之前过滤或阻止响应。

可调试

检查回合的每一层：推理、工具调用和语音、文本和音频。

可观察的

流入您已经运行的评估和监控工具。

你的，不是共享 api

建立您的代理

在提示中设置工作流程，为其提供调用工具，选择其个性。

您的专有网络

部署在您的云中。 数据永远不会离开您的网络。

随着时间的推移而改善

像新销售代表一样用反馈来指导它。 或者根据您自己的调用对其进行微调。

费用相同

与级联堆栈同等。

pilot

对一个用例进行为期 30 天的试点。

让我们开始吧

© 2026 元语音
